system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "street_style", "story_keys": ["96588dba-cef6-4f87-95fd-d7176fd112b4"], "article_ids": ["c4adee6b-67d4-4266-a06f-f4035f6a8861"], "editorial_angle": "捕捉伦敦街头袜饰的趣味化趋势，动物纹与彩虹色系成为打破沉闷造型的关键单品", "title_zh": "伦敦街头袜饰新风：动物纹与彩虹色点亮造型", "dek_zh": "从动物纹到缤纷彩虹，趣味 tights 正成为伦敦时装周街头最具活力的配饰语言", "source_names": ["Coveteur"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "c4adee6b-67d4-4266-a06f-f4035f6a8861", "source_name": "Coveteur", "title_raw": "All Hail, Fun Tights!", "summary_raw": "We spotted an array of fun tights in rainbow colors and fun patterns in in London Fashion Week and beyond. See how to style them and shop our picks.", "body_markdown": "# All Hail, Fun Tights!

We spotted an array of fun tights in rainbow colors and fun patterns in in London Fashion Week and beyond. See how to style them and shop our picks.

## All Hail, Fun Tights!

From polka dots to neon lace, statement hosiery returns as fashion’s favorite styling move.

London Fashion Week just reminded us of a fool-proof way to liven up any look—the fashion tight, or, as we're calling them at Coveteur HQ, the fun tight. The fun tight exists in many forms: pops of color, dainty lace, and unexpected patterns. For the Fall/Winter 2026 season, we spotted them all over London Fashion Week, both on the runways and on the streets—a sign that this is a trend that will continue to persist into fall.

Colored and patterned fashion tights first hit their stride in the mod heyday of the 1960s, styled with swingy miniskirts and made iconic by the likes of Twiggy. What started as a punchy pop of color quickly became something bigger: a graphic, youth-driven rejection of the beige status quo, and an early signal that personal style was about attitude, not assimilation. This is just another of many examples of the trend cycle being cyclical—as we move away from the era of quiet luxury, maximalism and color-clashing are once again emerging on the runways.

Bora Aksu Fall/Winter 2026

Launchmetrics

Bora Aksu Fall/Winter 2026

Launchmetrics

Beginning with Bora Aksu’s Fall/Winter 2026 show, lace tights added a new level of coquette to an already frilly, lace, and tulle-forward collection. However, the styling was unexpected—a pair of white lace tights was paired with a dark gray anti-traditional bride look, complete with a tulle cape and veil, for example. For Aksu, the tights contributed to his show storytelling, which explored the duality of darkness and light.

Sinead Gorey Fall/Winter 2026

Launchmetrics

Sinead Gorey Fall/Winter 2026

Launchmetrics

Over at Sinead Gorey's Fall/Winter 2026 show, fun tights both complemented and contrasted. A shirt dress with drummer-boy military detailing was paired with a Penny Lane coat and argyle tights, and a belted leather mini skirt was paired with a baseball tee, Ushanka hat, argan tights, and yellow heeled sandals.

Sinead Gorey Fall/Winter 2026

Launchmetrics

Sinead Gorey Fall/Winter 2026

Launchmetrics

Later on the runway, military jackets were paired with tights that featured drummer-boy military braiding all the way up and pale blue coats were paired with perfectly coordinated pale blue tights. Gorey's runway perfectly demonstrated how a pair of tights can completely change up a look.

Launchmetrics

Show-goers and fashion lovers wholeheartedly embraced this trend, too. We spotted all forms of fashion tights on the streets of London, with animal print tights being a standout pattern. In one look, zebra-printed tights perfectly coordinated a blazer while simultaneously contrasting with a leopard-print bag; in another, tiger-printed tights served as the statement-maker of an otherwise black ensemble.

Launchmetrics

Colorful tights in shades of rich burgundy, bright lavender and baby blue added an unexpected touch, clashing in the best way. One look in particular we can't stop thinking about: a show-goer paired Ashley Williams'' "I Heart Me" tights with leopard-print boots, a colorful fur-trimmed tweed coat, striped neck-tie, patterned knit, long pearl necklace, and more. Maximalism is back, baby.

Have we convinced you of the versatility of the fun tight yet? Keep scrolling to shop some of our favorite picks.
"}]}
